									<p>ACTIVISU’s measurement solutions give opticians the precise position of a patient’s eyes in relation to their lenses-information essential to crafting corrective lenses and sunglasses. 									<p>The phorapter is one of the basic tools used by optometrists to measure the refractive error and determine the eyeglass numbers of the patient.
